productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Team Training Black Blue Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to college or work.Height:18"Width: 12.5"Depth: 8"Capacity: 30 L Made of polyester with a nylon and polyester lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag Water resistant tarpaulin bottom One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with separator One front zippered compartment with organizers and pouches for easy use Printed facade with swoosh and brand name printed on the side Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable Air Max handles and padded back for carrying ease, better air flow, comfort and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries CareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
